messages.content: hey, kind of a brutal week honestly. just wanna decompress for a sec

That sounds like a week worth setting down for a minute.

What's been weighing on you most?
work's been slammed, three deadlines stacked on top of each other and my manager keeps adding stuff

That kind of piling-on is genuinely exhausting — not just the work itself, but the feeling that the pile has no floor.

What's it been like trying to keep up with it all?
i'm just wiped. like physically tired, gonna crash early tonight and hopefully feel human tomorrow

Rest sounds exactly right for tonight.

Is there anything you want to put into words before you go, or is it more just good to have said it out loud?
ngl part of me wishes i could just disappear for a weekend with no phone lol. a cabin or something

That image makes a lot of sense — sometimes the mind needs a door it can actually close.

What would feel most restorative about that kind of quiet?
anyway thanks for letting me vent. nothing's wrong really, just needed to dump it somewhere
Glad it helped to say it out loud. Get some rest — sounds like you've earned it.
